title: draba lactea
intro: Draba lactea, also known as milk whitlow grass or white draba, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Draba. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and promote healing, offering health benefits such as relieving joint pain and soothing skin irritations. Draba lactea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used to make salves and ointments for topical application.
